mapper.select: SELECT LEVEL_ID, REQUIRED_EXP FROM LEVEL_POLICIES ORDER BY LEVEL_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EXP_HISTORIES ( EXP_LOG_ID, USER_ID, GAINED_EXP, SOURCE_TYPE, SOURCE_ID, GAINED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_EXP_HISTORIES.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{gainedExp}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ATTENDANCES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRUNC(ATTENDANCE_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCES( ATTENDANCE_ID, USER_ID, ATTENDANCE_DATE )VALUES( SEQ_ATTENDANCES.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(ATTENDANCE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM ATTENDANCES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ATTENDANCE_DATE DESC
SELECT Q.QUIZ_ID, Q.QUIZ_QUESTION, Q.QUIZ_ANSWER, Q.QUIZ_EXPLAIN, Q.QUIZ_REWARD FROM QUIZZES Q JOIN QUIZ_CALENDAR C ON Q.QUIZ_ID = C.QUIZ_ID WHERE TRUNC(C.QUIZ_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_QUIZZES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRUNC(SOLVED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_QUIZZES ( USER_ID, QUIZ_ID, SOLVED_AT, IS_CORRECT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{quizId}, SYSDATE, #{isCorrect} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.ACHIEVEMENT_ID, a.ACHIEV_NAME, a.ACHIEV_DESC, a.REWARD_EXP, a.REWARD_TITLE_ID, TO_CHAR(ma.ACHIEVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS achievedAt, NVL(ma.IS_REWARDED, 'N') AS isRewarded FROM ACHIEVEMENTS a LEFT JOIN MEMBER_ACHIEVEMENTS ma ON a.ACHIEVEMENT_ID = ma.ACHIEVEMENT_ID AND ma.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ma.ACHIEVED_AT DESC, a.ACHIEVEMENT_ID ASC
SELECT ACHIEVEMENT_ID, REWARD_EXP, REWARD_TITLE_ID FROM ACHIEVEMENTS WHERE ACHIEVEMENT_ID = #{achievementId}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO MEMBER_ACHIEVEMENTS ma USING DUAL ON (ma.USER_ID = #{userId} AND ma.ACHIEVEMENT_ID = #{achievementId}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(USER_ID, ACHIEVEMENT_ID, ACHIEVED_AT, IS_REWARDED) VALUES(#{userId}, #{achievementId}, SYSDATE, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_QUIZZES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_CORRECT = 'Y'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO MEMBER_TITLES mt USING DUAL ON (mt.USER_ID = #{userId} AND mt.TITLE_ID = #{rewardTitleId}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(USER_ID, TITLE_ID, GAINED_AT) VALUES(#{userId}, #{rewardTitleId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT t.TITLE_ID, t.TITLE_NAME FROM MEMBER_TITLES mt JOIN TITLES t ON mt.TITLE_ID = t.TITLE_ID WHERE mt.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY mt.GAINED_AT DESC
